releases.name: Native Property Operator 0.1.1

releases.author: jqml
releases.description:
- Native property catalog for frontmatter property names and supported Obsidian-style property types.
- Saved manual actions for adding, removing, renaming, and setting property values.
- Create/move auto actions for Markdown notes entering configured target folders.
- Preview, multi-file confirmation, and overwrite confirmation workflows.
- Changed/skipped/failed result reporting with conflict reasons.
- Supported property types: Text, List, Number, Checkbox, Date, Date & time, and Tags.
releases.name: Native Property Operator 0.1.0
